description.en: Graduated with honors. Focused on software engineering, algorithms, and distributed systems. Thesis on 'Optimizing Real-Time Data Processing in Distributed Systems Using Apache Kafka.'
description.id: Lulus dengan predikat cumlaude. Berfokus pada rekayasa perangkat lunak, algoritma, dan sistem terdistribusi. Tesis tentang 'Optimasi Pemrosesan Data Real-Time dalam Sistem Terdistribusi Menggunakan Apache Kafka.'

description.en: Graduated with distinction. Active in mathematics and science olympiads. Developed first web project during senior year.
description.id: Lulus dengan pujian. Aktif dalam olimpiade matematika dan sains. Mengembangkan proyek web pertama di kelas akhir.
